channel.title: VM Conversion on This Is My Demo
channel.description: Recent content in VM Conversion on This Is My Demo

item.title: Migrating VMs from VMware to Hyper-V
item.description: Summary Complete guide to converting and migrating virtual machines from VMware vSphere to Hyper-V. Covers conversion tools (Microsoft Virtual Machine Converter alternatives, Veeam, StarWind V2V, manual methods), pre-conversion preparation, driver injection, post-conversion validation, and common pitfalls. Addresses both online and offline migration scenarios. Key Deliverables: Migration tool comparison matrix, pre-migration assessment checklist, conversion procedure guide, post-migration validation script Repository: All scripts, calculators, and resources available at github.com/thisismydemo/hyper-v-renaissance DRAFT - Content to be developed
